<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please fill the sections below.
For breaking changes, link to or include an ADR in docs/adr/.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences explaining the WHY of this change -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Tooling / infrastructure
- [ ] 🧪 Tests

## Linked issues

<!-- Use "Closes #123" or "Refs #123" -->

## Test plan

- [ ] `bash tests/forge-eval.sh` passes
- [ ] Manual test: <!-- describe what you tested manually -->
- [ ] If `tools/bootstrap` was touched: ran a real bootstrap on a temp project
- [ ] If a starter was touched: starter still produces a working project

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I updated relevant documentation (README, CLAUDE.md, ADRs)
- [ ] I added tests where appropriate
- [ ] No secrets, personal paths, or private project names in the diff

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, logs, design notes — anything that helps the reviewer -->
